# Distilled Principles

Auto-generated from docs.gitlab.com by `scripts/ai/sync_principles.rb`.

**Do not edit these files manually.** They are overwritten by the sync script
when their SSOT source documentation changes. To modify a principle, update
the source docs on docs.gitlab.com or the baseline in `../baselines/`.

The `.checksums.yml` file tracks content checksums to detect when
re-distillation is needed.
